name: harness.debug_spawn_overmap_threat_options_mcw
description: Exercise the debug overmap threat spawn submenu end-to-end: spawn medium hordes plus writhing stalker and zombie rider threats at 5/10 OMT, save, then inspect saved horde_map distance bands and counts.

steps.label: settle_loaded_map_before_debug_spawn_options
steps.expected_visible_fact: the loaded live map is settled before debug menu shortcut input begins

steps.label: debug_spawn_medium_horde_5_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the medium horde 5 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_medium_horde_5_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record medium_horde_5_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the medium_horde_5_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: debug_spawn_medium_horde_10_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the medium horde 10 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_medium_horde_10_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record medium_horde_10_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the medium_horde_10_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_5_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the writhing stalker 5 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_writhing_stalker_5_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record writhing_stalker_5_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the writhing_stalker_5_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_10_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the writhing stalker 10 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_writhing_stalker_10_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record writhing_stalker_10_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the writhing_stalker_10_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: debug_spawn_zombie_rider_5_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the zombie rider 5 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_zombie_rider_5_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record zombie_rider_5_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the zombie_rider_5_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: debug_spawn_zombie_rider_10_omt
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug overmap threat spawn returns to the live map after selecting the zombie rider 10 OMT option

steps.label: audit_log_zombie_rider_10_omt
steps.abort_reason: debug log did not record zombie_rider_10_omt immediately after the debug spawn submenu selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug log records the zombie_rider_10_omt spawn option after its submenu shortcut is selected

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_overmap_spawn_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug overmap spawns and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_overmap_spawns
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug overmap spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug overmap spawn steps

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_overmap_spawns
steps.expected_visible_fact: the save confirmation returns to a stable screen before the following mtime gate proves writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_overmap_spawn_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug overmap spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug overmap spawn save

steps.label: audit_saved_hordes_after_debug_overmap_spawns
steps.abort_reason: saved horde_map metadata did not contain the requested medium horde/stalker/rider count and 5/10 OMT distance-band state after same-run debug overmap spawn save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved horde_map metadata contains 30-zombie medium hordes and exact stalker/rider threats in separate 5/10 OMT distance bands
